fixtureList.fixtureRemark:
V. HIRE : USD 16,950.00 PER DAY OR PRO RATA FOR 6 MONTHS +/- 30 DAYS AND IN CHOPT.
          USD 20,340.00 PER DAY OR PRO RATA IN CHOPT FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS.
          IF REDELIVERY IN WAFR THEN BALLAST BONUS OF USD 325,000 IS PAYABLE BY CHARTERERS TO OWNERS.

W. HIRE INCLUDES ANGOLAN WITHHOLDING TAX (WHT) UP TO MAXIMUM 6,5% OF MONTHLY GROSS HIRE COMMUNICATION COSTS DEDUCTABLE AT SOURCE, 2.5% ADDRESS 
   COMMISSION FOR SONANGOL SHIPPING PAYABLE BY OWNERS, AND 2,50 PCT PAYABLE BY OWNERS TO BRAZILSHIP/SCANBRASIL COMERCIO MARITIMO LTDA FOR 
   DIVISION WITH NOMINATED BROKER

remarkList.remark: Point Lisas added where she'll be redelivered to owners.
Now also marked with comm. on "future" revenue line resulting in additional -$427 TCE/day on top of the -$716 from previously updated on same issue.

Comm. amounts not marked on revenue lines due to Charterer asking not to deduct add. comm. on hire invoices raised to them but instead they invoice us later. Now all already invoiced revenue lines are marked so financials are correct and accruals will work.

time charterers with Sonangol extended for another 6 months at net rate USD 18,000 per day - invoicing USD 18,900 as we will receive invoices for 2.5% address commission and 2.5% broker commission separately
have revised hire rate to USD 15,000 bse + 2.5% add com +2.5% broker com = USD 15,750
hire rate changed from USD 16,950 to USD $16,350.00 (including broker commission) a reduction of USD 77k over the 6 months
vessel MT Ngol Cubango has on 29 Nov been cleared for STS with Schwyz
